object.PropertiesDefinition: [ { "name": "__configJSON", "title": "Operation config (JSON)", "hint": "Full RTDS operation Params object as JSON. Must include all required Params fields for the operation type.", "controlSettings": { "controlType": "text", "maxLength": 5000, "dataType": "string", "readonly": false } }, { "name": "__environment", "title": "Environment", "hint": "Deployment environment. Controls which RTDS API endpoint is called.", "controlSettings": { "controlType": "environment", "defaultValue": "acc", "maxLength": 100, "dataType": "string", "readonly": false } }, { "name": "__nextStep", "title": "Next step (output variable name)", "hint": "Name of the session variable that will receive the next step Id after execution. Defaults to _nextStep.", "controlSettings": { "controlType": "text", "defaultValue": "_nextStep", "maxLength": 100, "dataType": "string", "readonly": false } }, { "name": "__outputVar", "title": "Output variable name", "hint": "Name of the session variable that will receive the result of this operation. Defaults to result.", "controlSettings": { "controlType": "text", "defaultValue": "result", "maxLength": 100, "dataType": "string", "readonly": false } } ]
